search_queries_used: site:dha.gov.ae telehealth chest pain Issue 2 history red flags referral investigations
candidate_sources_rejected: automatic acute-coronary-syndrome, pulmonary-embolism or aortic diagnosis
automatic diagnosis, investigation, treatment, medication, dose, procedure, referral, escalation, or discharge instructions
search snippets, landing pages, and broad source-family matches without an exact applicable section
rejection_reasons: Chest pain is undifferentiated until clinician assessment.
No investigation, treatment, medicine, dose, escalation or disposition is generated.
Autonomous clinical output is outside this documentation-only research programme and was not mapped.
Only opened exact official documents and directly applicable sections were accepted as evidence.
population_applicability: Adults with chest pain; pediatric, pregnancy, trauma, postoperative and established-diagnosis pathways require separate evidence.
setting_applicability: DHA virtual-care documentation domains partially transfer to UAE emergency assessment.
UAE_applicability: Direct DHA evidence, with local emergency, cardiology, respiratory, vascular, imaging and laboratory pathways required.
recency_verification: DHA Issue 2 (2024) exact source was reviewed on 2026-07-14.
superseded_check: No later official DHA issue was identified.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The exact DHA chest-pain history section supports documenting onset, duration, severity, functional impact, associated symptoms, relevant negatives and clinician-assessed risk context without inferring a cause.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Specifies onset, site, character, radiation, severity, exertional and relieving factors, associated symptoms, duration, trauma, travel, and prior testing.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The exact red-flag and referral section supports recording measured vital data, time-critical symptoms, and escalation or specialist discussion only when assessed or clinician-decided.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Lists life-threatening chest-pain patterns, associated breathlessness, syncope, diaphoresis, abnormal physiology, and emergency referral requirements.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The exact investigation section supports documenting tests or imaging already performed or reviewed by the clinician, without recommending them.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Limits testing to the assessed presentation and lists blood studies, chest radiography, ECG, and echocardiography where clinically indicated.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The adult virtual-care scope was reviewed and limits transfer to undifferentiated in-person emergency chest pain.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Defines chest-pain scope in DHA telehealth and emphasises potentially life-threatening causes and emergency exclusion.

unresolved_source_gaps: Detailed pain descriptors, cardiovascular and thromboembolic risk, examination, ECG, biomarkers, imaging, diagnosis, treatment, reassessment, observation and disposition remain unsupported.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
